item.title: A simple trick for cleaner eyeliner
item.description: Stop your concealer from sabotaging your liner. A little translucent powder creates the perfect dry canvas to prevent smudging!

media:content.media:title: A simple trick for cleaner eyeliner
media:content.media:description: Stop your concealer from sabotaging your liner. A little translucent powder creates the perfect dry canvas to prevent smudging!

item.title: Lift Your Eyes Without Surgery With a Simple Hack
item.description: “Foxy eyes” can be done without surgery, by following this step by step makeup tutorial. This beginner friendly tutorial will show you how to achieve the foxy eyes eye lift on hooded and droopy eyes by a simple makeup technique.

media:content.media:title: Lift Your Eyes Without Surgery With a Simple Hack
media:content.media:description: “Foxy eyes” can be done without surgery, by following this step by step makeup tutorial. This beginner friendly tutorial will show you how to achieve the foxy eyes eye lift on hooded and droopy eyes by a simple makeup technique.

item.title: Why eyeshadow fades by noon
item.description: Ever wonder why your eyeshadow moves by noon? It’s usually hidden oils and "gunk" on your lids. Cleanse first for a flawless finish

media:content.media:title: Why eyeshadow fades by noon
media:content.media:description: Ever wonder why your eyeshadow moves by noon? It’s usually hidden oils and "gunk" on your lids. Cleanse first for a flawless finish
